payload.description:
As an operator, I want feedback-backed optimizer runs to fail immediately when required item metadata is missing or a score returns ERROR, so that ProcedureTask, Evaluation, and procedure chat clearly explain why no cycles ran.

## Behavior
Feature: Optimizer run failure visibility for broken feedback-backed evaluations

Scenario: Feedback-backed evaluation loses required item metadata
Given an optimizer run starts an initial evaluation from feedback items
And the feedback loading path does not provide the related item metadata payload
When dataset rows are built for evaluation
Then the run fails immediately
And the failure message identifies the feedback item or item id with missing metadata
And TaskStage, Task, Evaluation, and procedure chat show that failure reason

Scenario: Score execution returns ERROR during initial evaluation
Given an optimizer run starts an initial evaluation
When any score execution returns value ERROR
Then the evaluation fails immediately
And the initial evaluation stage is marked failed with the execution error details
And the procedure does not continue to RCA or optimization cycles
And the same failure reason is visible in ProcedureTask, Evaluation, and procedure chat

Scenario: Feedback item loading query fails
Given a date-bounded feedback-backed evaluation
When the GSI query for feedback items fails
Then the run fails instead of falling back to a lower-fidelity metadata-dropping query
payload.title: Fail fast on missing feedback item metadata and surface optimizer evaluation errors
